scripts.dev: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run build && electron dist/main.js
scripts.start: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run build && electron dist/main.js
scripts.dist: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:slim: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.slim.yml
scripts.dist:unsigned: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --config.mac.identity=null
scripts.dist:slim:unsigned: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.slim.yml --config.mac.identity=null
